services.catalogueDescription: Discover our selection of certified dermatology products
services.aboutDescription: Learn more about our team and expertise

hero.title:
Your skincare,
certified.
hero.description: A dermo-cosmetic pharmacy curated by specialists. ISDIN, La Roche-Posay, Filorga and 10 more brands.

sun.title: Sun protection
sun.description: SPF 30 to 50+, light textures designed for the Dominican Republic's tropical climate.

repair.title: Repair & soothing
repair.description: Balms, serums and formulas targeted at sensitive, irritated or damaged skin.

brightness.title: Radiance & evenness
brightness.description: Anti-spot serums, vitamin C, niacinamide. For a more luminous, even tone.

expertise.title:
A pharmacy,
not a store.
expertise.p1: Every product in our catalogue is selected, tested and recommended by our pharmacist-dermatologists. We don't sell what's pitched to us — we sell what we'd prescribe.
expertise.p2: If you have a question about your skin, write to us. A real human, trained in dermo-cosmetics, will reply the same day.
expertise.signature: — An initiative led by a collective of Dominican pharmacists.

morning.title: Cleanse & protect
morning.description: Gentle cleansing gel, vitamin C serum, SPF 50 sunscreen. The minimum ritual to start the day under the tropical sun.

evening.title: Remove & regenerate
evening.description: Micellar water, hyaluronic acid serum, night cream. The moment skin accepts the most potent actives.

weekly.title: Exfoliate & nourish
weekly.description: Clay mask or gentle exfoliant. A weekly gesture to kickstart cellular regeneration.

newsletter.title:
Once a month,
no more.
newsletter.description: New releases, pharmacist tips, and subscriber-only offers. Promise it's short.
newsletter.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts, try again in a moment.

errors.alreadyActive: You already have an active reservation. Wait for its resolution or contact us via WhatsApp.

Reservation.pageDescription: FARMAU reservation tunnel. No online payment — coordination via WhatsApp.

address.title: Delivery address
address.lede: We need your phone number to coordinate delivery via WhatsApp.
address.streetHint: Add the building name or any landmark if needed.
address.phoneHint: We'll contact you at this number to coordinate payment and delivery.

errors.missingFields: Please fill in all required fields.

shipping.title: How would you like to receive your order?
shipping.lede: We pre-selected the zone based on your postal code. You can switch to in-pharmacy pickup.

santo_domingo.title: Santo Domingo
santo_domingo.subtitle: 24-48h delivery · Distrito Nacional + Greater Santo Domingo · CP 10000-11999

interior.title: Rest of the country
interior.subtitle: 3-5 day delivery · Anywhere else in the Dominican Republic

pickup.title: Pharmacy pickup
pickup.subtitle: Free · Pick up when it suits you

review.title: Confirm your reservation
review.lede: Review everything is correct. Then we'll open WhatsApp with a message ready to send.
review.noteLede: A preferred time? A question for our pharmacists?
review.notePlaceholder: E.g. Call me before stopping by.
review.ctaSubLabel: We'll open WhatsApp with a message ready to send
review.consent: By reserving, you agree we may contact you on WhatsApp at the number provided.

Reservation.disclaimer: This is a reservation, not a payment. Our team will contact you via WhatsApp to confirm availability and coordinate the payment (cash, bank transfer or in pharmacy).

deliveryLabels.santo_domingo_subtitle: You receive within 24 to 48 hours after confirmation.
deliveryLabels.interior_subtitle: You receive within 3 to 5 days after confirmation.
deliveryLabels.pickup_subtitle: Pick up when it suits you.

errors.auth_required: You must be signed in to reserve.
errors.already_active: You already have an active reservation.

Reservation.successDescription: We'll contact you via WhatsApp within the next 24h to schedule pickup at the pharmacy. After this delay, the reservation is automatically cancelled.
Reservation.confirmationLede: Click the button below: we've prepared a message with every detail of your reservation.

confirmation.whatsappTitle: Reach us on WhatsApp to coordinate.
confirmation.whatsappBody: Your reservation is saved, but not yet definitive. Open WhatsApp with the message ready and our team will confirm availability and coordinate payment (cash, transfer or in pharmacy) and delivery.
confirmation.whatsappCtaSub: We'll open WhatsApp with a message ready
confirmation.fallback: Can't use WhatsApp? <call>Call us at +1 (809) 123-4567</call> or write to <mail>hola@farmau.do</mail>.

timeline.step1Body: We've just saved your reservation with the reference {ref}. You'll find it in your account.
timeline.step2Body: Open WhatsApp with the button above. The message is pre-filled — just send it. We can also call you if you prefer.
timeline.step3Body: We check stock in pharmacy, confirm the total, and offer payment methods: cash, bank transfer or at one of our partner pharmacies.
timeline.step4Body: 24-48 hours in Santo Domingo · 3-5 days for the rest of the country · or whenever you'd like to pick it up in pharmacy.

confirmation.secondaryReservationsSub: All your history in one place

strength.fair: Fair · add a number or a symbol.
strength.good: Good · you can strengthen it further with a symbol.

Login.title: Sign in
Login.lede: Sign in to find your orders, your wishlist and speed up your next reservations.

aside.quote: Pharmaceutical-grade dermo-cosmetics, explained by the people who practice them every day.

Signup.title: Create an account
Signup.subtitle: Join the FARMAU community

Signup.requiredFields: All fields are required except date of birth.
Signup.termsAccept: By signing up you accept our <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

aside.quote: Every product in the catalog has been hand-picked by a pharmacist-dermatologist.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.missingFields: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.emailAlreadyUsed: This address already has an account. <signin>Sign in</signin> instead.
errors.disposableEmail: Disposable email addresses are not accepted.

ForgotPassword.title: Recover password
ForgotPassword.lede: We'll send you a link by email to create a new password.
ForgotPassword.successBody: If this address is registered, you'll receive a link shortly. Don't forget to check your spam folder.
ForgotPassword.retryHint: Not receiving it? Wait 2 minutes before requesting a new link.

aside.quote: Your pharmacist knows you. Your password, not so much.

ResetPassword.title: New password
ResetPassword.lede: Choose a password of at least 8 characters.
ResetPassword.expiredBody: Recovery links expire after 1 hour. Request a new one.

errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.expired: This link is no longer valid.

Profile.phoneHint: Required to confirm reservation via WhatsApp.

Contact.headerSubtitle: Our team of pharmacist-dermatologists is at your disposal to answer your questions
Contact.addressLine1: Calle Jesus de Galindez Esq. Calle 3
Contact.whatsappDescription: For a quick reply, contact us directly via WhatsApp

ContactForm.title: Contact us
ContactForm.intro: A question, advice, or a quote request? Our team replies within 24-48h.
ContactForm.success: Your message has been sent successfully! We'll reply quickly.
ContactForm.emailHint: We'll only use it to reply to you.
ContactForm.subjectPlaceholder: What is the subject of your message?

conditions.haveAccount: No account required to write to us
conditions.useAccountEmail: Provide a valid email where we can reply

About.heroDescription: The first 100% dermatological pharmacy in the Dominican Republic, FARMAU puts medical expertise at the service of your skin. Our pharmacist-dermatologists support you with personalized advice and a rigorous selection of clinically proven treatments.
About.teamDescription: Our pharmacist-dermatologists, trained in Europe and the United States, are continuously available to analyze your skin, decipher INCI lists and build a tailored routine.
About.qualityDescription: Because your skin deserves the best, we import only FDA / EMA certified treatments, tested under dermatological control and compliant with European standards.
About.addressValue: Calle Jesus de Galindez Esq. Calle 3, Cerros de Gurabo, Santiago, D.R.
About.value1Description: FDA/EMA approved products, clinically tested for your safety.
About.value2Description: Pharmacist-dermatologists trained in Europe and the United States.
About.value3Description: Skin analysis, custom routines and continuous follow-up for optimal results.

products.vitCDesc: Instant glow, wrinkles smoothed in 4 weeks

reviews.r1Content: Accurate skin diagnosis! A difference after two weeks.
reviews.r2Content: Wide variety of dermatological brands unavailable elsewhere.
reviews.r3Content: Effective post-acne protocol: dark spots halved!
reviews.r4Content: WhatsApp order ready in 10 min, very convenient.

trust.deliveryBody: Santo Domingo in 24h · rest of the country 2-3 days
